name: Mariner 9
fact: First spacecraft to orbit another planet. Arrived at Mars during a planet-wide dust storm and waited until the atmosphere cleared. Returned 7,329 images covering 100% of the Martian surface — the first global mosaic of any planet besides Earth. Discovered Olympus Mons, Valles Marineris, and the polar layered terrain.
capability: First-ever orbital reconnaissance of another planet — defined the template for every subsequent orbital science mission.
